inputs.label: Fuel Consumption (L/100km)
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle's fuel consumption rate per 100 km

businessContext_i18n.en: Vehicle's fuel consumption rate per 100 km
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın 100 km başına yakıt tüketim oranı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de consommation de carburant du véhicule aux 100 km
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de consumo de combustible del vehículo por cada 100 km
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل استهلاك الوقود للمركبة لكل 100 كم

businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du carburant par litre
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio actual del combustible por litro

inputs.label: Number of Trips
inputs.businessContext: Multiply by number of trips to obtain total cost

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiply by number of trips to obtain total cost
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam maliyeti elde etmek için seyir sayısıyla çarpın
businessContext_i18n.de: Mit Anzahl der Fahrten multiplizieren, um Gesamtkosten zu erhalten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplier par le nombre de trajets pour obtenir le coût total
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicar por el número de viajes para obtener el costo total
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضرب في عدد الرحلات للحصول على التكلفة الإجمالية

inputs.label: Additional Cost per Trip
inputs.businessContext: Any fixed additional cost per trip (e.g., tolls, maintenance)

businessContext_i18n.en: Any fixed additional cost per trip (e.g., tolls, maintenance)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sefer başına herhangi bir sabit ek maliyet (örn. köprü geçiş ücreti, bakım)
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Zusatzkosten pro Fahrt (z. B. Maut, Wartung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tout coût fixe supplémentaire par trajet (péages, entretien)
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier costo fijo adicional por viaje (p. ej., peajes, mantenimiento)
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي تكلفة إضافية ثابتة لكل رحلة (مثل الرسوم، الصيانة)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
